mistake_log.scenario: Rave about the coffee and say you wish you'd found this place sooner
mistake_log.user_answer: Este café está maravilloso. Deseo que encontré este lugar antes.
mistake_log.corrected_answer: nunca habia probado algo tan bueno ojala hubiera descubierto este lugar antes

mistake_log.scenario: Agree enthusiastically and insist on paying next time since they always treat you
mistake_log.user_answer: Por supuesto pero ¿yo debería pagar porque siempre pagas?
mistake_log.corrected_answer: por supuesto la proxima vez deberias dejarme pagar porque siempre pagas

mistake_log.scenario: Describe the mix of neighbors and say you think they'll fit right in
mistake_log.user_answer: Son muy amigables y ¿te gusta la

issues.feedback_explanation: You said 'son muy amigables', but 'son un buen grupo' is needed to describe the mix of neighbors.

issues.corrected_snippet: algunos jovenes profesionistas y algunas familias creo que te vas a llevar muy bien con todos
issues.feedback_explanation: You left out the details about the neighbors being young professionals and families, which is important for the description.

mistake_log.corrected_answer: son un buen grupo algunos jovenes profesionistas y algunas familias creo que te vas a llevar muy bien con todos

mistake_log.scenario: Say he gave her the flowers and a note, but she gave everything back to him in front of everyone without even reading it
mistake_log.user_answer: Le di las flores. Le dió las flores y una nota pero ey, ah, movió todo. Ella le movió todo en frente de todos, sin ni quinceañera. Lo de Gendo.

issues.feedback_explanation: You said 'le di' instead of 'le dio', which changes the subject of the action.
You used 'movio' instead of 'devolvio', which is not the correct verb for returning something.
You omitted 'sin siquiera leerla', which is important for conveying that she didn't read it.

mistake_log.corrected_answer: le dio las flores y una nota pero ella se lo devolvio todo frente a todos sin siquiera leerla

mistake_log.scenario: Say yes, she told him not to come
mistake_log.user_answer: Sí le dijo que no fueron.

issues.feedback_explanation: You said 'fueron', but 'fueran' is correct because it matches the subjunctive mood required here.
You omitted 'que' which is necessary to connect the clauses properly.

mistake_log.corrected_answer: si le dijo que no fuera

mistake_log.scenario: Say yes, she told him not to come

issues.feedback_explanation: You said 'me dijo que no fuera', but you missed the subject 'ella' which is important for clarity.
You said 'me dijo', but 'le dijo' is correct because it refers to him.

mistake_log.corrected_answer: ella le dijo que no fuera

mistake_log.scenario: Say yes, he brought her a huge cake
mistake_log.user_answer: Si le llevo un pastel grande.

issues.feedback_explanation: You said 'grande', but 'enorme' is more natural because it emphasizes the size more.

mistake_log.corrected_answer: si le llevo un pastel enorme
